long_setup_summary: Always-in-side >=0 + two-leg pullback down + optional second_entry_buy_proxy + pullback_depth_atr within threshold + optional bull_signal_bar/strong_bull_close
short_setup_summary: Always-in-side <=0 + two-leg pullback up + optional second_entry_sell_proxy + pullback_depth_atr within threshold + optional bear_signal_bar/strong_bear_close
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low; Short: signal_high. Configurable rolling alternate.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Current-10 PA covers buy_sell_close_trend continuation; H2/L2 second-entry pullback is a distinct setup family

long_setup_summary: trading_range_score above threshold + close_in_lower_third_{w} + optional failed_breakout_down or second_entry_buy_proxy or bull_signal_bar + not tight_tr
short_setup_summary: trading_range_score above threshold + close_in_upper_third_{w} + optional failed_breakout_up or second_entry_sell_proxy or bear_signal_bar + not tight_tr
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low or range_lower_third_floor. Short: signal_high or range_upper_third_ceiling.
target_r_policy: fixed_r only (target_r 0.8-1.2). Do NOT materialize range_mid/opposite_third as target price in strategy.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: No current-10 strategy uses trading-range BLS/HS context; range_breakout/failure are distinct from PA trend continuation

long_setup_summary: pa_range_breakout_down + pa_close_back_inside_range within N + optional failed follow-through + optional bull signal bar; block strong bear BO follow-through
short_setup_summary: pa_range_breakout_up + pa_close_back_inside_range within N + optional failed follow-through + optional bear signal bar; block strong bull BO follow-through
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Current-10 failed_orb is opening-range-specific; this is generic range failure across rolling windows {30/60/90}
notes: Distinct from failed_orb by feature_config and entry geometry

long_setup_summary: Early session window + initial selloff + test of S (prior_low/orb_low/vwap/prior_close/rolling_low) + optional failed_breakout_down or bull reversal bar
short_setup_summary: Early session window + initial rally + test of R (prior_high/orb_high/vwap/prior_close/rolling_high) + optional failed_breakout_up or bear reversal bar
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Current-10 has orb_continuation/orb_retest_continuation/failed_orb at opening but none model reversal at S/R; current-10 gap_acceptance_failure is gap-specific not S/R reversal
notes: Different setup conditions; distinct setup codes

long_setup_summary: prior strong bull BO score + pullback to BO level/VWAP/prior R as S + optional weak countertrend pullback + optional bull signal bar + optional always-in long/neutral
short_setup_summary: prior strong bear BO score + pullback to breakdown/VWAP/prior S as R + optional weak countertrend pullback + optional bear signal bar + optional always-in short/neutral
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low or pullback_low. Short: signal_high or pullback_high.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Current-10 has buy_sell_close_trend; this is BO+pullback combo not generic trend continuation; current-10 orb_continuation is opening-specific
notes: Generic BO+pullback applicable to any session window

long_setup_summary: tight_bull_channel_score above threshold + pullback depth acceptable + bull signal bar/strong bull close + optional always-in long/neutral + not transition-to-TR + not late bull climax
short_setup_summary: tight_bear_channel_score above threshold + pullback depth acceptable + bear signal bar/strong bear close + optional always-in short/neutral + not transition-to-TR + not late bear climax
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: No current-10 strategy uses channel scores; tight-channel pullback is a distinct regime-aware setup

long_setup_summary: broad bull channel + lower/buy zone + pullback acceptable + optional second_entry_buy_proxy or bull reversal + not tight TR
short_setup_summary: broad bear channel + upper/sell zone + pullback acceptable + optional second_entry_sell_proxy or bear reversal + not tight TR
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low or zone_floor. Short: signal_high or zone_ceiling.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: No current-10 strategy uses broad channel zones; distinct regime-aware setup

long_setup_summary: prior bear trend + trendline_break_up + test_low + optional higher_low/wedge_bottom + bull reversal bar + mtr_bottom_score above threshold
short_setup_summary: prior bull trend + trendline_break_down + test_high + optional lower_high/wedge_top + bear reversal bar + mtr_top_score above threshold
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low or major_low. Short: signal_high or major_high.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Diagnostic-only major-trend-reversal not modeled by current-10
notes: Stays diagnostic in implementation until later evidence

long_setup_summary: wedge_bottom_proxy or three_push_down_proxy + S/magnet proximity if required + optional failed_breakout_down or bull signal
short_setup_summary: wedge_top_proxy or three_push_up_proxy + R/magnet proximity if required + optional failed_breakout_up or bear signal
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Diagnostic-only wedge/three-push reversal not modeled by current-10

long_setup_summary: late bear trend + climax_down_score above threshold + optional S/magnet proximity + failed follow-through down + bull reversal bar
short_setup_summary: late bull trend + climax_up_score above threshold + optional R/magnet proximity + failed follow-through up + bear reversal bar
stop_logic_summary: Long: signal_low or climax_low. Short: signal_high or climax_high.
duplicate_avoidance_rationale: Diagnostic-only climax/late-trend reversal not modeled by current-10
